title: Bouncing Ball Animation
description: Create a ball that bounces up and down continuously.
solution: .ball { width: 50px; height: 50px; background: #f59e0b; border-radius: 50%; animation: bounce 0.6s ease infinite alternate; } @keyframes bounce { from { transform: translateY(0); } to { transform: translateY(-80px); } }

title: Fade In Animation
description: Create a fade-in entrance animation for a heading.
solution: h1 { font-size: 48px; color: #ffd700; animation: fadeIn 1s ease both; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

title: Typing Indicator Dots
description: Create three dots that animate like a typing indicator.
hint: Use separate animation-delay values for each dot.
startingCode: .dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; }
solution: .dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; animation: bounce 1.4s ease infinite both; } .dot:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -0.32s; } .dot:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.16s; } @keyframes bounce { 0%,80%,100% { transform: scale(0); } 40% { transform: scale(1); } }

title: Complex Multi-Phase Animation
description: Create an animation that moves a box in a square path, rotating at corners.
hint: Use percentage keyframes for each corner.
solution: .box { width: 60px; height: 60px; background: #3b82f6; animation: squarePath 4s ease infinite; } @keyframes squarePath { 0% { transform: translate(0,0) rotate(0); } 25% { transform: translate(200px,0) rotate(90deg); } 50% { transform: translate(200px,200px) rotate(180deg); } 75% { transform: translate(0,200px) rotate(270deg); } 100% { transform: translate(0,0) rotate(360deg); } }
